crime.value: Double murder by decapitation with severed ears sent as a package to victim's sister
crime.quote: I got past it and got one in with my stick that crushed his head like an egg

victim.value: Alec Fairbairn and his lover, targeted due to adultery that destroyed the perpetrator's marriage
victim.quote: she threw her arms round him, crying out to him, and calling him 'Alec.'

closed_world.value: Maritime setting where perpetrator had access to victims on a boat in isolated waters
closed_world.quote: Then I tied the bodies into the boat, stove a plank, and stood by until they had sunk

culprit_and_motive.value: Jealous husband seeking revenge for adultery that broke up his marriage and turned his wife against him
culprit_and_motive.quote: I would have spared her, perhaps, for all my madness, but she threw her arms round him

resolution.value: Holmes deduces the solution and provides the criminal's name to Lestrade for arrest
resolution.quote: I have found out everything! A shocking crime has been committed, and I think I have now laid bare every detail

investigator.value: Sherlock Holmes, consulting detective who solves the case through deductive reasoning
investigator.quote: In choosing a few typical cases which illustrate the remarkable mental qualities of my friend, Sherlock Holmes

suspect_architecture.value: Limited cast revealed: Jim Browner (perpetrator), Sarah Cushing (instigator), Alec Fairbairn (victim), Mary (victim). Clear motives: jealousy, revenge, adultery.
suspect_architecture.quote: I struck again, and she lay stretched beside him. I was like a wild beast then that had tasted blood.

red_herring.value: The cardboard box delivery mechanism creates false impression of random targeting rather than specific revenge plot.
red_herring.quote: That night I made up the packet for Sarah Cushing, and next day I sent it from Belfast.

clue_fairness.value: Holmes claims complete solution but reader only receives confession afterward. Solution process not fully shared with reader.
clue_fairness.quote: I have found out everything! A shocking crime has been committed, and I think I have now laid bare every detail

social_world.value: Maritime working class dynamics, family tensions, and colonial service backgrounds shape the crime's social context.
social_world.quote: my term of service in India had trained me to stand heat better than cold

alibi.value: Browner's ship-based alibi initially conceals his ability to commit murders then return undetected to his vessel.
alibi.quote: I cleaned myself up, got back to land, and joined my ship without a soul having a suspicion

reveal_mechanic.value: Solution delivered through perpetrator's written confession rather than deductive demonstration, breaking from typical Holmes format.
reveal_mechanic.quote: There you have the whole truth of it. You can hang me, or do what you like with me

media_and_audience.value: Watson frames case as deliberately choosing non-sensational crimes, though acknowledging impossibility of separating sensation from crime.
media_and_audience.quote: I have endeavoured, as far as possible, to select those which presented the minimum of sensationalism

investigator_wound.value: Holmes's philosophical despair over meaningless cycles of violence and suffering, questioning universal purpose.
investigator_wound.quote: What object is served by this circle of misery and violence and fear? It must tend to some end

_meta.title: ebook sir arthur conan doyle the adventure of the cardboard box
